title: License Scanner + Evidence Packager — SBOM License Compliance Export
description: license_scanner.py has 100+ package database with SPDX mapping, policy engine (ALLOW/WARN/BLOCK), and per-dependency risk scoring. test_evidence_packager_unit.py and test_signing_verify.py cluster here. Gap: license scan results are stored in SQLite but not exported to the SBOM engine as CycloneDX license metadata, and the signing/verification is not applied to license scan evidence bundles.
missing: SBOM license export: integrate license_scanner results into sbom_export_engine CycloneDX component license field population automatically
Evidence bundle signing: apply ECDSA signing (from signing_verify module) to all exported evidence packages so auditors can verify tamper-proof provenance
BLOCK license CI gate: fail CI when license_scanner detects a BLOCK-policy license in any new dependency added to requirements.txt or package.json
